N:=55;

    314769*G^13*x^20 + 1252880*G^13*x^19 - 3384337*G^13*x^18 + 6617898*G^13*x^17 - 9537765*G^13*x^16 + 9726944*G^13*x^15 - 6050910*G^13*x^14 + 931994*G^13*x^13 + 1650688*G^13*x^12 - 967428*G^13*x^11 - 
    243837*G^13*x^10 + 252670*G^13*x^9 + 146979*G^13*x^8 - 125856*G^13*x^7 - 51002*G^13*x^6 + 67092*G^13*x^5 - 11020*G^13*x^4 - 8800*G^13*x^3 + 4419*G^13*x^2 - 728*G^13*x + 37*G^13 + 576*G^12*x^23 - 
    7475*G^12*x^22 + 46508*G^12*x^21 - 206199*G^12*x^20 + 727340*G^12*x^19 - 1949514*G^12*x^18 + 3814344*G^12*x^17 - 5433659*G^12*x^16 + 5680320*G^12*x^15 - 4281510*G^12*x^14 + 2055158*G^12*x^13 - 
    237107*G^12*x^12 - 433476*G^12*x^11 + 238810*G^12*x^10 + 49900*G^12*x^9 - 111267*G^12*x^8 + 90256*G^12*x^7 - 75537*G^12*x^6 + 39414*G^12*x^5 - 1275*G^12*x^4 - 9304*G^12*x^3 + 4470*G^12*x^2 - 824*G^12*x + 
    51*G^12 + 48*G^11*x^23 - 1633*G^11*x^22 + 18128*G^11*x^21 - 105462*G^11*x^20 + 398120*G^11*x^19 - 1096509*G^11*x^18 + 2277180*G^11*x^17 - 3497784*G^11*x^16 + 3840064*G^11*x^15 - 2933970*G^11*x^14 + 
    1626380*G^11*x^13 - 915330*G^11*x^12 + 749916*G^11*x^11 - 555610*G^11*x^10 + 242390*G^11*x^9 - 69471*G^11*x^8 + 69672*G^11*x^7 - 79807*G^11*x^6 + 39222*G^11*x^5 + 300*G^11*x^4 - 9604*G^11*x^3 + 4605*G^11*x^2 
    - 908*G^11*x + 63*G^11 - 230*G^10*x^22 + 4026*G^10*x^21 - 32697*G^10*x^20 + 160160*G^10*x^19 - 527877*G^10*x^18 + 1253034*G^10*x^17 - 2210238*G^10*x^16 + 2881616*G^10*x^15 - 2692800*G^10*x^14 + 
    1773800*G^10*x^13 - 1003691*G^10*x^12 + 889644*G^10*x^11 - 972147*G^10*x^10 + 725420*G^10*x^9 - 303534*G^10*x^8 + 62696*G^10*x^7 - 17360*G^10*x^6 + 13032*G^10*x^5 + 1195*G^10*x^4 - 7120*G^10*x^3 + 
    3867*G^10*x^2 - 866*G^10*x + 70*G^10 + 418*G^9*x^21 - 6300*G^9*x^20 + 43400*G^9*x^19 - 182856*G^9*x^18 + 529002*G^9*x^17 - 1115880*G^9*x^16 + 1764736*G^9*x^15 - 2097255*G^9*x^14 + 1854342*G^9*x^13 - 
    1258075*G^9*x^12 + 826980*G^9*x^11 - 735702*G^9*x^10 + 682170*G^9*x^9 - 447741*G^9*x^8 + 170536*G^9*x^7 - 22946*G^9*x^6 - 10446*G^9*x^5 + 9675*G^9*x^4 - 6300*G^9*x^3 + 2877*G^9*x^2 - 702*G^9*x + 67*G^9 + 
    22*G^8*x^21 - 609*G^8*x^20 + 6760*G^8*x^19 - 40755*G^8*x^18 + 154746*G^8*x^17 - 404991*G^8*x^16 + 775168*G^8*x^15 - 1124895*G^8*x^14 + 1257578*G^8*x^13 - 1091961*G^8*x^12 + 768576*G^8*x^11 - 513733*G^8*x^10 +
    392990*G^8*x^9 - 301851*G^8*x^8 + 174456*G^8*x^7 - 57904*G^8*x^6 + 516*G^8*x^5 + 10350*G^8*x^4 - 6252*G^8*x^3 + 2229*G^8*x^2 - 488*G^8*x + 48*G^8 - 42*G^7*x^20 + 680*G^7*x^19 - 5491*G^7*x^18 + 27864*G^7*x^17 
    - 95285*G^7*x^16 + 229904*G^7*x^15 - 407880*G^7*x^14 + 551446*G^7*x^13 - 583310*G^7*x^12 + 491472*G^7*x^11 - 339812*G^7*x^10 + 210800*G^7*x^9 - 134532*G^7*x^8 + 86504*G^7*x^7 - 44163*G^7*x^6 + 11976*G^7*x^5 +
    2255*G^7*x^4 - 3668*G^7*x^3 + 1602*G^7*x^2 - 354*G^7*x + 34*G^7 + 20*G^6*x^19 - 361*G^6*x^18 + 2826*G^6*x^17 - 13243*G^6*x^16 + 41696*G^6*x^15 - 93495*G^6*x^14 + 155372*G^6*x^13 - 197717*G^6*x^12 + 
    197724*G^6*x^11 - 157861*G^6*x^10 + 101790*G^6*x^9 - 55377*G^6*x^8 + 28808*G^6*x^7 - 15540*G^6*x^6 + 6954*G^6*x^5 - 1300*G^6*x^4 - 764*G^6*x^3 + 633*G^6*x^2 - 186*G^6*x + 21*G^6 + 54*G^5*x^17 - 663*G^5*x^16 +
    3616*G^5*x^15 - 11745*G^5*x^14 + 25704*G^5*x^13 - 40716*G^5*x^12 + 48960*G^5*x^11 - 46002*G^5*x^10 + 34020*G^5*x^9 - 19575*G^5*x^8 + 8776*G^5*x^7 - 3437*G^5*x^6 + 1488*G^5*x^5 - 590*G^5*x^4 + 56*G^5*x^3 + 
    96*G^5*x^2 - 50*G^5*x + 8*G^5 + 48*G^4*x^15 - 435*G^4*x^14 + 1764*G^4*x^13 - 4251*G^4*x^12 + 6840*G^4*x^11 - 7854*G^4*x^10 + 6720*G^4*x^9 - 4374*G^4*x^8 + 2136*G^4*x^7 - 735*G^4*x^6 + 156*G^4*x^5 - 15*G^4*x^4
    + 14*G^3*x^13 - 104*G^3*x^12 + 336*G^3*x^11 - 616*G^3*x^10 + 700*G^3*x^9 - 504*G^3*x^8 + 224*G^3*x^7 - 56*G^3*x^6 + 6*G^3*x^5);
r:=(x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
